ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-11-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-10-2023 Continued To Sep-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gary Farwell appeared by zoom for Marjorie Williams.

The court noted that instructions were given at the last hearing with respect to filing of a pleading and that nothing has been filed. Mr. Farwell stated that the final accounting can be filed as soon as his client returns it by the end of the week. The court informed Mr. Farwell that it needs to see either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of a status report. Status on close of estate is continued to September 11, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-03-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-03-2023 Continued To Jul-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gary Farwell appeared via courtcall for administrator.

The court noted that Mr. Farwell indicated that he had technical problems getting on at the last hearing. Based on Mr. Farwell's representation to the court, the order to appear/order to show cause is off calendar. Mr. Farwell stated that he should be able to file the final accounting within 90-days. Status on close of estate is continued to July 10, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If Mr. Farwell cannot file a petition for final distribution, he will need to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration by that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-06-2023 Continued To Apr-03-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Administrator Marjorie C. Williams and Attorney Gary A. Farwell to appear on Apr-03-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why neither a petition for final distribution nor a petition for approval of report on status of administration has been filed. An order to show cause will be issued for the same date to Attorney Gary A. Farwell to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed for failure to appear. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
